raw_description: Slows victim's movement and aiming.
Disables or destroys electronics. Effective against equipment, scorestreaks, and enemy players.
Grenade that shoots tracking devices at enemies. Tracked enemies are marked on the minimap and visible through walls for a short time.
Blinds and deafens targets.
Military stimulant that quickly heals combat wounds.
Explodes on impact, releasing a lingering cloud of hallucinogenic gas.
Deploys a smoke screen that blocks vision and automated targeting systems.
Personal defense drone hovers in air and targets enemy Equipment, Field Upgrades, and Scorestreaks. Can counter grenades.
Grenade that simulates footsteps and gunfire sounds to confuse enemies. Sticks to surfaces.
Electrical device that sticks to surfaces and electrocutes enemies, stunning them.
notes: Mastery action was not visible in the capture.

raw_description: Cookable fragmentation grenade.
Grenade that scatters smaller explosives when detonated.
Timed sticky grenade.
Small flying drone that explodes on impact. Toggles between auto or manual control.
Thrown incendiary weapon creates a patch of flames.
Small deployable sentry turret that automatically shoots at enemies, distracting and damaging them.
Large explosive that sticks to surfaces and can be detonated remotely with RB when the equipment is depleted. Double-tapping F always detonates the explosives.
notes: Displayed control prompts reflect the active input devices.

raw_description: Thrown axe that kills enemies in one hit. Bounces off surfaces.
A grenade that explodes on impact.
notes: Mastery action was not visible in the capture.

raw_description: Creates a large fuel-air cloud that explodes after a duration.
notes: Mastery action was not visible in the capture.
